title: DHB 老项目 Xcode 新版兼容与第三方库升级整改
summary: DHB 是老 iOS 工程，Xcode Cloud / 新版 Xcode 暴露出 YYText、AFNetworking、MsePaySDK、签名配置、Release 链接配置等兼容问题。本任务用于从临时 cloud-build 镜像修复升级为正式 DHB 项目整改：先保证云打包可过，再评估将兼容补丁、SDK 升级、第三方库治理迁回真实 DHB GitLab 主项目。

gates.name: Intent / Intake
gates.purpose: 记录用户目标、任务类型、任务等级和是否需要在 task board 展示完整流程。

gates.name: Discovery
gates.purpose: 记录 superpowers 调研过程中选中的项目、场景、规则、skill、证据来源和未知项。

gates.name: Plan / Product UI
gates.purpose: 记录 superpowers 输出的产品、UI、技术方案或交互原型，以及用户确认点。

gates.name: Development
gates.purpose: 记录当前开发项目、写入范围、使用的 superpower、验证预期和恢复位置。

gates.name: Integration
gates.purpose: 记录单项目运行、跨项目联调、环境切换、阻塞项和处理后恢复步骤。

gates.name: Acceptance
gates.purpose: 记录对照需求、UI、接口、diff 和测试结果的验收状态。

gates.name: Run / Package Archive
gates.purpose: 记录调试运行、测试/预发/正式打包、最终验证、已知缺口和交接说明。

projectProgress.summary: 正式整改目标项目。当前真实 DHB GitLab 主项目尚未合入 mirror 里的兼容补丁；需要评估 YYText、AFNetworking、MsePaySDK、Release 签名/链接配置、最低系统版本和 Pods 依赖治理，再决定哪些补丁迁回主项目。
临时云打包工具链。BrandApp 已在 GitHub mirror/cloud-build 分支生成过程中做兼容补丁，适合短期保证 Xcode Cloud 打包；当前 PackageTool 已清理第三方库临时 patch，并新增 GitHub mirror 配置切换、cloud-build 分支查看和删除能力。
已新建独立整改 task，避免继续把 DHB 老项目升级治理混在 BrandApp 云打包 task 或旧 YYText 口径里。

whyLocalXcodeCanRunButCloudFails: 本地旧 Xcode/旧 SDK 对部分老代码和旧二进制库更宽松，或还没触发新版编译器/链接器检查。
Xcode Cloud 使用新版 Xcode 和新版 iOS SDK，先暴露了 YYText 链式比较、AFNetworking 私有头、MsePaySDK Swift compatibility 链接、Release archive 签名配置等问题。
如果本机后续升级到同等或更高版本 Xcode，真实 DHB 主项目大概率也会遇到同类问题，所以需要正式整改。
currentMirrorOnlyChanges: YYText: 修复 YYTextLayout.m 的 chained comparison 编译错误。
AFNetworking: 删除 <netinet6/in6.h> 私有头直接 import，保留 <netinet/in.h>。
Signing/archive: 调整 Release archive 阶段签名/entitlements 配置以适配 Xcode Cloud。
MsePaySDK: 为 Release 配置补 Swift compatibility force_load 链接，解决 __swift_FORCE_LOAD_$_swiftCompatibility* 未定义符号。
这些目前主要存在于 GitHub mirror/cloud-build 路线，不等于真实 DHB GitLab 主项目已经完成整改。

msePaySDKFindings.officialMetadata: 下载包响应 Last-Modified 为 2025-11-05；包内 iOS device framework 使用 Xcode 15.2 / iPhoneOS SDK 17.2 / Swift 5.9.2 / MinimumOSVersion 12.0；CFBundleShortVersionString 仍为 1.0。
msePaySDKFindings.currentDHBMetadata: DHB 当前 MsePaySDK.xcframework 使用 Xcode 13.4.1 / iPhoneOS SDK 15.5 / Swift 5.6.1 / MinimumOSVersion 10.0；CFBundleShortVersionString 为 1.0。
msePaySDKFindings.risk: 官方 v0.0.7 比当前 DHB 内置包新，但包内仍可看到 swiftCompatibility force-load 符号；升级 SDK 可能降低旧 Swift 编译器风险，但仍需验证 Xcode Cloud archive 和真机运行。

shortTerm: 继续用 BrandApp 生成 GitHub cloud-build 分支，作为 Xcode Cloud 云打包止血路线。
确认云端 Fetch source code 使用最新 commit；不要只重建旧构建记录。
在 mirror 中保持 YYText、AFNetworking、MsePaySDK、Release signing 的兼容补丁，直到云打包能稳定出包。
midTerm: 在真实 DHB GitLab 主项目建立升级分支，逐项迁移 mirror 中验证过的兼容补丁。
优先评估 MsePaySDK 官方 v0.0.7 替换当前内置包，验证 API 是否兼容、最低系统版本从 iOS 10 到 iOS 12 的影响、App Store/TestFlight/真机支付流程。
对 YYText、AFNetworking 做最小升级或本地补丁固化，避免每次云打包临时 patch。
longTerm: 整理 DHB 第三方库台账：版本、来源、最后更新、是否有源码、是否支持新版 Xcode/iOS SDK、替代方案。
逐步替换多年不维护或不支持新版 SDK 的库；YYText 可列入替换/封装评估，AFNetworking 可评估升级或迁移网络层。
把 Xcode Cloud / 新版 Xcode archive 纳入常规验证，避免只依赖开发机旧 Xcode。

vendorQuestions: 我们当前接入的 MsePaySDK.xcframework 包内 Info.plist 显示 CFBundleShortVersionString = 1.0、DTXcode = 1341、DTXcodeBuild = 13F100、DTSDKName = iphoneos15.5，Swift interface 显示 Apple Swift 5.6.1，MinimumOSVersion = 10.0。
我们在新版 Xcode / Xcode Cloud 构建时遇到 __swift_FORCE_LOAD_$_swiftCompatibility50/51/56/Concurrency/DynamicReplacements 未定义符号的链接错误。
官网 iOS SDK 页面当前提供的下载包是 MsePaySDK.xcframework-v0.0.7.zip，包内显示 Xcode 15.2、iPhoneOS SDK 17.2、Swift 5.9.2、MinimumOSVersion 12.0，但 CFBundleShortVersionString 仍为 1.0。
请确认 MsePaySDK.xcframework-v0.0.7.zip 是否为当前最新生产版本，是否支持 Xcode Cloud / Xcode 16 / Xcode 17 构建。
如果仍会产生 swiftCompatibility force-load 符号，官方推荐宿主 App 如何配置 OTHER_LDFLAGS、LIBRARY_SEARCH_PATHS、ALWAYS_EMBED_SWIFT_STANDARD_LIBRARIES 和 Embed & Sign？
从我们当前旧包升级到 v0.0.7 是否有 API 变更、行为变更、最低 iOS 版本变化、支付/微信拉起流程注意事项或 release notes？

notes.text: 任务从 BrandApp Xcode Cloud 云打包排障拆出。当前已确认 Xcode Cloud 只是把问题提前暴露：本地旧 Xcode 能跑不代表升级本机 Xcode 后不会遇到同类编译/链接问题；DHB 需要做正式升级治理，而不是只依赖 GitHub mirror 临时补丁。

2026-05-11 live discovery: in /Users/xj/Documents/ios/DHB on branch xuanjian/yytext替换, Xcode 26.2 (17C52) succeeded for Debug simulator build, Release iphoneos build, and Release iphoneos archive with CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO. Main repo still differs from XcodeCloud mirror: AFNetworking netinet6 imports remain, YYText chained-comparison lines remain, and mirror-only Release swiftCompatibility force_load/link flags are not migrated. Remaining remediation should distinguish compile/archive pass from formal dependency governance, cloud signing/export, and whether to intentionally migrate mirror patches into DHB main.

2026-05-11 resource setup: cloned GitLab custombrandresource master into /Volumes/T7/DHBBrandApp/DHBCompanyConfig at commit 90be73a; existing non-git directory was preserved as /Volumes/T7/DHBBrandApp/DHBCompanyConfig.backup-20260511122116; cleaned macOS AppleDouble ._* sidecar files generated on external disk and verified git status clean plus git fsck --connectivity-only exit 0.

User confirmed do not migrate Pod source patches for YYText/AFNetworking yet because pod install can regenerate Pods and drop manual edits. Proceeding only with Release link configuration migration in DHB main project.

Migrated only DHB Release target swift compatibility link settings into /Users/xj/Documents/ios/DHB/DHB.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj. Did not edit Pods/YYText or Pods/AFNetworking because pod install can regenerate Pods and drop manual patches. Verified with xcodebuild Release iphoneos archive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO: ARCHIVE SUCCEEDED; existing Pods deployment target warnings remain.

Implemented Pod patch layer for YYText 1.0.7 and AFNetworking 4.0.1 without tracking Pods source: added PodPatches files, scripts/apply-pod-patches.sh, and Podfile post_install hook. Pods directory is ignored, which is acceptable because pod install will regenerate Pods and post_install will reapply patches. Verified patch red/green check, idempotent script, Podfile ruby syntax, script sh syntax, and Release iphoneos archive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO succeeded. Could not run pod install locally because /usr/local/bin/pod cannot find cocoapods gem in system Ruby.

Corrected CocoaPods verification: /usr/local/bin/pod is broken in Codex PATH, but /opt/homebrew/bin/pod works. Ran /opt/homebrew/bin/pod install --no-repo-update in DHB successfully; post_install invoked patch script and reported Already applied for AFNetworking and YYText patches. Follow-up rg check found no netinet6 import or YYText chained-comparison patterns.

In BrandApp PackageTool, removed cloud snapshot patches for third-party library compatibility now owned by DHB main: no more YYText, AFNetworking, or Swift compatibility link mutation in CloudBuildGitSpec. Kept cloud-build signing/entitlements snapshot patches. Verified CloudBuildGitSpecTests with swiftc standalone.

Implemented BrandApp PackageTool GitHub mirror branch management: repository profiles persisted in UserDefaults, current mirror/source branch can be saved and switched, remote cloud-build branches are listed via git ls-remote, and only cloud-build/* branches can be deleted with confirmation via git push delete refspec. Verified CloudBuildGitSpecTests, PackageTool xcodebuild Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build, and read-only ls-remote against git@github.com:xuanjian/DHB-IOS-XcodeCloud-Mirror.git showing cloud-build/brandapp and cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian.

MsePaySDK decision guidance: fixing Swift compatibility link settings in DHB main can be accepted as short-term build remediation if archive and runtime payment flow pass, but it does not remove vendor/version risk. Still keep vendor confirmation or SDK upgrade evaluation because current package was built with older Xcode/Swift/iOS SDK, official v0.0.7 exists, and future Xcode/iOS changes may surface new binary compatibility or behavior issues.

After inspecting Xcode Signing & Capabilities warning, removed PackageTool cloud snapshot patch that forced DHB.xcodeproj CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY from Apple Development to Apple Distribution and stopped injecting CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO. Cloud snapshot patching now leaves project signing settings unchanged and only keeps Release entitlements aps-environment production adjustment. Verified CloudBuildGitSpecTests and PackageTool Debug xcodebuild CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build.

Fixed PackageTool remote cloud-build branch deletion failure: git ls-remote works outside a repo, but git push <remote> :refs/heads/<branch> requires a git repository current directory. CloudBuildManager.deleteRemoteBranch now validates and runs git push from the configured DHB projectPath, and the UI disables/guards deletion when DHB project path is empty. Added CloudBuildManagerTests using a local bare remote and non-git current directory to reproduce the failure. Verified CloudBuildGitSpecTests, CloudBuildManagerTests, and PackageTool Debug xcodebuild CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build.

Investigated Xcode Cloud failure for Longjingwang app on branch cloud-build/rsung.brandapp.longjingwang: ReactiveCocoa target referenced RACCompoundDisposableProvider.d and RACSignalProvider.d in Pods.xcodeproj, but those files were missing from the mirror branch. Local DHB had the .d files, while DHB .gitignore ignored Pods. User confirmed DHB .gitignore should no longer ignore Pods. Removed both /DHB/Pods/* and top-level Pods ignore entries, verified ReactiveCocoa files are no longer git-ignored. Updated PackageTool git clean calls in PackageManager.recoveryProject and CloudBuildManager.cleanupLocalBranch to preserve Pods/ so untracked Pods are not deleted before they are committed/tracked. Verified CloudBuildGitSpecTests, CloudBuildManagerTests, and PackageTool Debug xcodebuild CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build.

Revised Longjingwang ReactiveCocoa Pods strategy after user clarified DHB main should keep ignoring Pods. DHB .gitignore remains with Pods and Podfile.lock ignored. Added executable ci_scripts/ci_post_clone.sh to DHB so Xcode Cloud runs pod install --repo-update after checkout; local script execution succeeded, installed 33 pods, and Podfile post_install applied AFNetworking/YYText patches. PackageTool CloudBuildGitSpec snapshot filtering now excludes top-level Pods/ and DHB/Pods/ while keeping Podfile.lock, Podfiles, PodPatches, scripts/apply-pod-patches.sh, and ci_scripts/ci_post_clone.sh. PackageTool git clean still preserves Pods/ locally. Verified CloudBuildGitSpecTests and PackageTool Debug xcodebuild CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build.

recoveryPoint: 新窗口进入该任务时，先看本 task 的 upgradePlan 和 vendorQuestions；如果继续云打包，先确认 GitHub cloud-build/com.rsung.songguowulian 是否已从最新 HEAD 触发构建；如果进入正式整改，目标应切到真实 DHB GitLab 主项目而不是只改镜像。
